summary: The synthetic bridge packet correctly enforces opaque handles and advisory semantics, but requires follow-up to ensure finding keys remain stable across runs.

findings.title: Finding key stability needs verification
findings.summary: Evidence C notes a generic finding key is reuse-ready, but the caveat warns that not all findings are equally portable; follow-up should confirm key stability across runs.

findings.title: Caller-owned authority underspecified
findings.summary: Evidence B indicates the caller-owned authority note is underspecified; follow-up should tighten the public-safe bridge packet template.

decision.summary: The synthetic bridge packet correctly enforces opaque handles and advisory semantics, but requires follow-up to ensure finding keys remain stable across runs.

non_blocking_findings.title: Finding key stability needs verification
non_blocking_findings.summary: Evidence C notes a generic finding key is reuse-ready, but the caveat warns that not all findings are equally portable; follow-up should confirm key stability across runs.

non_blocking_findings.title: Caller-owned authority underspecified
non_blocking_findings.summary: Evidence B indicates the caller-owned authority note is underspecified; follow-up should tighten the public-safe bridge packet template.

follow_up: Verify that all reusable finding keys remain stable and generic across multiple bridge runs.
Tighten the public-safe bridge packet template to better specify caller-owned authority boundaries.
